primary_surface: Public status page root in chromeless embed mode with title, banner, components, and feed visible by default
surfaces: Embed section toggles for title, banner, components, and feed
Forced light and dark theme override while embed mode is active
Open status banner with internal links opening in a new tab
Component uptime trackers and grouped tracker accordion
Status feed with report and maintenance events
Standalone status page mode with header navigation and footer controls restored

verification.browser: Verified with local Google Chrome through playwright-core because the in-app browser backend was unavailable
evidence: Default runtime URL resolves to http://127.0.0.1:5173/?embed=&theme=light
Embed shell has data-embed=true and the public header display is none
No fixture toolbar is visible in the default embed viewport
Title, banner, components, and feed sections are visible in the default embed state
Embed mode inserts robots noindex,nofollow metadata
Internal banner link has target=_blank in embed mode
Feed section toggle sets data-hide-feed=true and hides .section-feed
theme=dark applies the dark class only while embed mode is active
Standalone whitelabel mode keeps footer controls but hides powered-by attribution
Standalone mode restores header display and footer controls
